content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
meni ubade duleke aniya ninggun biya de
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

### I am not well-versed in Manchu, but I will attempt the translation based on my knowledge and resources. The sentence "meni ubade duleke aniya ninggun biya de" seems to be related to a legal or formal context. A rough translation could be "I did not receive the document from that person." Please note that this translation might not be entirely accurate due to the complexity and specificity of the Manchu language. ###
